name: tag_contact
description: Apply a tag to a contact in Intercom for segmentation and organization. Tags help categorize contacts by behavior, subscription plan, lifecycle stage, or any custom grouping. You must provide the contact ID and the tag ID. A contact can have multiple tags. Tags must already exist in your workspace before they can be applied. Use this for contact segmentation, targeted messaging, and workflow automation triggers.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique Intercom contact ID to tag. This is a path parameter in the URL.

parameters.name: tag_id
parameters.description: The ID of the tag to apply to the contact. The tag must already exist in your Intercom workspace.
